DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. FILED BY DEFENDANT COMCAST CABLE COMMUNICATIONS, LLC. DBA XFINITY
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2025BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JEFF HAAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COMCAST CABLE COMMUNICATIONS, LLC IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT IS NILES HALL VIA ZOOM. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAAS, JEFF IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMCAST CABLE COMMUNICATIONS, LLC. DBA XFINITY COMCAST CORPORATION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IN OPEN COURT, PLAINTIFF WILL RETURN PHONE TO RETAIL OUTLET OR STONESTOWN GALLERIA IN SF AND DEFENDANT WILL WAIVE ANY AND ALL OUTSTANDING CHARGES ASSOCIATED WITH PHONE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
